# PACK&GO Refactor v2 — Plan

**Trigger:** Jeff's "做到最好才行" mandate post-v1; expand scope to autonomy depth + mobile.
**Baseline:** commit `d133596`, tag `refactor-v1-complete` (Stage 1 audit committed 2026-05-19).
**Inputs:** `docs/refactor/v2-audit-2026-05-19.md` (831 LOC, 11 domains A–K) + new Domain L (Mobile).
**Generated by:** Vibe Coding Stage 2 design agent.
**Working tree at plan time:** clean (`git status` empty per v1 close).
**Total estimated effort:** **~420 AI-agent hours + ~22 Jeff review hours** across 4 waves.
**Calendar window:** 4–6 weeks (Jeff burst capacity ~6–8h/week active review; sub-agents run autonomous between).

---

## Executive Summary

v1 (May 2026) shipped the structural mountain: routers.ts -97%, supplierSync split, Stripe webhook idempotent + tested, husky pre-commit tsc gate. v2 is a different beast — **the engine is sound but the autonomous-agent loop Jeff's "省人力 + 不犧牲品質" thesis depends on is half-wired** (8 agents, 5 missing sub-intents, 0 Vitest), **5 god-files survived v1** (15,671 LOC across `TourDetailPeony` 3,827 / `db.ts` 3,584 / `masterAgent.ts` 3,300 / `agentRouter.ts` 2,804 / `TourEditDialog.tsx` 2,156), **zero observability** (no Sentry, no UptimeRobot, 1,445 raw `console.*`), **Admin.js bundles at 990 KB**, and **33 of 37 admin routers lack rate-limit**. v2 also adds **Domain L (Mobile)**: PWA for customers + React Native (Expo) for admin so Jeff can run his business from a phone. **Wave 1** lands observability + quick wins. **Wave 2** splits god-files. **Wave 3** wires the autonomy thesis end-to-end. **Wave 4** ships mobile + polish.

| Metric | v1 (shipped) | v2 (this plan) |
|---|---|---|
| Capability domains | N/A (single-track) | **12** (A–L) |
| Estimated AI-agent hours | 80 | **~420** |
| Jeff active hours | ~17 | **~22** |
| New Vitest files | 36 | **~45** (15 agents + 8 splits + 12 PWA/RN + 10 misc) |
| Calendar weeks | 3 days burst | **4–6 weeks** (4 waves, sequential with intra-wave parallelism) |
| Deploys | 3 prod | **~12 prod** (per-wave deploys + per-module hotfix windows) |
| Final tag | `refactor-v1-complete` | **`refactor-v2-complete`** |

**Top 3 risks flagged in this plan (see §Risk register):** (1) Mobile push reliability on iOS Safari PWA + App Store review delays; (2) `db.ts` 11-import-surface fan-out breaking sub-routers if shim leaks; (3) React Native Manus OAuth deep-link flow + token storage on device.

---

## Wave Plan — 4 Waves

```
Wave 1 — Foundation + Observability         ~58h AI / ~3h Jeff   Week 1
   │  Sentry / UptimeRobot / PostHog / pino / Admin code-split / migration 0077
   ▼
Wave 2 — God-File Splits                    ~96h AI / ~4h Jeff   Weeks 1–3
   │  db.ts / TourDetailPeony / masterAgent / agentRouter / email / TourEditDialog
   ▼
Wave 3 — Autonomy Thesis                    ~110h AI / ~4h Jeff  Weeks 3–4
   │  5 sub-intents / skill registry / auto-dispatch / RefundAgent wire / 15 agent tests
   ▼
Wave 4 — Mobile + Polish                    ~156h AI / ~11h Jeff Weeks 4–6
      L1 PWA / L2 React Native / Playwright / i18n restructure / 1,203-leak sweep
```

**Critical path:** Wave 1 (Sentry + pino must land first to instrument Waves 2–4) → Wave 2 (`db.ts` split unblocks every sub-router touch) → Wave 3 (intents + registry are dependencies for Wave 4 mobile inbox parity) → Wave 4. Within each wave, modules parallelize as called out.

**Parallelism contract (avoiding v1's git race):** per `completed-2026-05-19.md` lesson 1 — sub-agents in v2 **commit sequentially via supervisor relay**. Sub-agents return diffs; supervisor stages, runs `pnpm tsc --noEmit + pnpm test`, commits, then dispatches next. No two sub-agents `git add` at the same time.

---

## Wave 1 — Foundation + Observability

**Goal:** Make every later wave debuggable. Land observability + quick-win bundle wins + the trivial migration 0077 cast removal. After Wave 1, prod has Sentry firing, UptimeRobot pinging, PostHog tracking 5 events, and Admin.js is per-tab lazy-loaded.

**Hours:** ~58 AI / ~3 Jeff. **Calendar:** Week 1 (Mon–Thu).
**Audit refs:** Domain F (observability §F line 363), Domain G partial (rate-limit + passport encrypt §G line 423), Domain H partial (Admin code-split §H line 488), Domain J (PostHog §J line 605), Domain K (migration 0077 §K line 692).

### Module 1.1 — Sentry + sourcemaps
- **Files:** new `server/_core/sentry.ts`; `package.json` add `@sentry/node`, `@sentry/react`, `@sentry/vite-plugin`; `client/src/main.tsx` + `server/_core/index.ts` wire `Sentry.init`; `.env.example` add `SENTRY_DSN`.
- **Tasks:** init in server entry, wrap tRPC root + every worker, init in client entry with React error boundary, add release tracking to deploy script, upload sourcemaps via vite plugin.
- **Free tier:** 5K events/mo (DECISION pending: Jeff approves free vs $26 Team — recommend free for v2, upgrade only if events overflow).
- **Vitest:** smoke test that `Sentry.captureException` is called when a tRPC handler throws (mocked transport). **Required per §九.**
- **Est:** 6h AI / 30min Jeff (account + DSN).

### Module 1.2 — Pino structured logger
- **Files:** new `server/_core/logger.ts` (pino instance + correlation ID middleware); replace `console.*` in `server/_core/*` (59 instances) + `server/agents/autonomous/*` (high-priority subset, ~120 of 1,445 total — full sweep deferred to Wave 4 polish).
- **Tasks:** pino w/ `pino-pretty` in dev, JSON in prod, level via `LOG_LEVEL` env, child loggers with request/correlation ID, NEVER log PII (passport, email, token).
- **Vitest:** logger redacts known PII keys. **Required.**
- **Est:** 8h AI.

### Module 1.3 — UptimeRobot + /health endpoint
- **Files:** new `server/_core/healthCheck.ts`; new tRPC `system.health` (public) returning `{db, redis, stripe, llm}` ping latencies; UptimeRobot account + 5-min ping to `/health`.
- **Tasks:** DB SELECT 1, Redis PING, Stripe `balance.retrieve` (cached 5min), LLM `models.list` (cached 1h). UptimeRobot alerts to Jeff's email.
- **Vitest:** `/health` returns 200 + all-green object on happy path; returns 503 if any dependency throws.
- **Est:** 4h AI / 30min Jeff (account).

### Module 1.4 — PostHog + 5 key events
- **Files:** `package.json` add `posthog-js`; new `client/src/_core/analytics.ts` wrapper; instrument 5 events: `tour_view`, `search`, `booking_start`, `booking_step` (param=stepName), `booking_complete`.
- **Tasks:** PostHog cloud (free 1M events/mo — DECISION: US cloud, lowest latency from Fly IAD). Anonymous ID until login; alias on auth. Strip query strings with PII.
- **Vitest:** wrapper sends only when `POSTHOG_KEY` present (test env); does not capture on dev.
- **Est:** 4h AI / 30min Jeff (account).

### Module 1.5 — Admin code-splitting
- **Files:** `client/src/pages/Admin.tsx` (currently bundles all 37 tabs); convert all `import X from './admin/X'` to `const X = lazy(() => import('./admin/X'))`; add `<Suspense fallback={<Skeleton/>}>` boundary per route.
- **Tasks:** wrap each tab content in `Suspense`; verify `pnpm build` output — Admin.js should drop from 990 KB to <200 KB shell + 37 chunks of ~25–60 KB each.
- **Vitest:** N/A (build-time); add Playwright smoke in Wave 4 instead.
- **Est:** 6h AI.

### Module 1.6 — Migration 0077 (emergency enum) + cast removal
- **Files:** new `drizzle/0077_inquiry_type_emergency.sql` (ALTER ENUM + optional backfill per audit §K line 638); `drizzle/schema.ts:1947` add `"emergency"` to `inquiryType` literal; remove `as "other"` cast at `server/routers/inquiries.ts:235`.
- **Tasks:** apply via Fly `release_command`; verify `inquiryType="emergency"` rows queryable post-deploy.
- **Vitest:** `createEmergency` test updated to assert `inquiryType="emergency"` not `"other"`.
- **Est:** 1h AI / 5min Jeff approval.

### Module 1.7 — Admin rate-limit middleware
- **Files:** new `server/_core/adminRateLimit.ts` exporting `adminMutationRateLimit` (Redis-backed token bucket, 60 req/min default); wrap `adminProcedure` definition in `server/trpc.ts` so every admin mutation auto-throttles.
- **Tasks:** apply across **29 admin router files** flagged in audit §G line 405. Use `ctx.user.id` as bucket key. Skip rate-limit on read-only `query` (only mutations).
- **Vitest:** 61st request in a minute → `TOO_MANY_REQUESTS`. **Required.**
- **Est:** 4h AI.

### Module 1.8 — Passport encryption + migration
- **Files:** new `drizzle/0078_passport_encryption.sql` (no schema change — column type stays VARCHAR but app-layer reads/writes through `tokenCrypto`); update `server/db/visa.ts` (post-Wave 2 split) read/write helpers to wrap `passportNumber` via `encryptToken`/`decryptToken`.
- **Tasks:** reuse `server/_core/tokenCrypto.ts` AES-256-GCM. Transparent migration: rows without `enc:v1:` prefix still readable (fallback path), new writes always encrypted. One-shot backfill SQL re-encrypts existing rows in 100-row batches.
- **Vitest:** encrypt → write → decrypt round-trip; legacy plaintext row still readable. **Required.**
- **Est:** 6h AI / 15min Jeff (review SQL).

### Module 1.9 — Delete ComponentShowcase + verify dead
- **Files:** delete `client/src/pages/ComponentShowcase.tsx` (1,436 LOC).
- **Tasks:** `grep -rn ComponentShowcase client/src` must return 0 refs; check `App.tsx` route table; if mounted anywhere, escalate to Jeff before delete.
- **Vitest:** N/A (deletion).
- **Est:** 0.5h AI.

### Wave 1 verification gate (must pass before Wave 2 starts)

- [ ] `pnpm tsc --noEmit` exit 0
- [ ] `pnpm test` all green (+ ~6 new Vitest cases from this wave)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds; `dist/public/assets/Admin-*.js` < 200 KB
- [ ] Sentry receiving events on staging deploy (manual: throw test error)
- [ ] UptimeRobot showing 200 OK on `/health`
- [ ] PostHog dashboard shows `tour_view` event after manual visit
- [ ] Migration 0077 applied on prod (`SELECT DISTINCT inquiryType FROM inquiries` includes `'emergency'`)
- [ ] Husky pre-commit still triggering tsc
- **Jeff review:** 30min — verify dashboards live + sign off on passport encryption migration timing.

**Wave 1 unblocks:** every subsequent wave can now use `logger.info`/`logger.error` instead of `console.*`, Sentry catches sub-agent regressions in prod, and admin rate-limit is in place before Wave 3 dispatches more auto-actions.

---

## Wave 2 — God-File Splits

**Goal:** Demolish 5 surviving god-files (15,671 LOC → ~7 files each ≤ 400 LOC) so blast radius is bounded and future AI edits are token-cheap. Sequenced so dependencies land first.

**Hours:** ~96 AI / ~4 Jeff. **Calendar:** Weeks 1 (tail) – 3 (head).
**Audit refs:** Domain C entirely (§C line 139), Domain D restructure (§D line 250), Domain H Tour code-split (§H line 489).
**Critical sequencing rule:** `db.ts` MUST land first (every sub-router imports from it). `masterAgent` and `TourDetailPeony` parallelize-safe after `db.ts` lands.

### Module 2.1 — Split `server/db.ts` 3,584 LOC → 7 files + shim

Per **D2 (locked):** 7-file split, NOT 11.

- **Files:**
  - `server/db/booking.ts` — extract bookings/participants/cancellations queries (audit §C "bookings" domain, roughly db.ts:312–891 — confirm via grep)
  - `server/db/tour.ts` — tours, departures, regions
  - `server/db/user.ts` — users, customerProfiles, membership
  - `server/db/payment.ts` — payments, vouchers, packpoint, refunds
  - `server/db/log.ts` — auditLog, llmCallLog, agentActionLog
  - `server/db/search.ts` — search index, browsingHistory, favorites
  - `server/db/accounting.ts` — plaid accounting, transactions, year-end export
  - `server/db.ts` (kept) — shim: `export * from "./db/booking"; export * from "./db/tour"; ...` so callers still `import { listBookings } from "../db"`.
- **Tasks:** preserve every export. Move tests alongside (`server/db/booking.test.ts` etc.). Run `pnpm tsc --noEmit` after each file move.
- **NEW domains NOT in 7-file split:** visa queries, inquiries, customTourRequests, agents → leave inside `db.ts` for now (under 500 LOC residual is acceptable). **Document residual in CLAUDE.md §六 update.**
- **Vitest:** 3 cases per new file (1 query happy, 1 not-found, 1 schema-drift detection). **Required.**
- **Est:** 14h AI / 30min Jeff (review 7 boundaries).

### Module 2.2 — Split `TourDetailPeony.tsx` 3,827 LOC → 8 sections

- **Files (new dir `client/src/pages/TourDetailPeony/`):**
  - `index.tsx` (target ≤ 400 LOC — props + section orchestration + sectionRefs)
  - `HeroSection.tsx` (lines ~2426–2772 in current file, 346 LOC)
  - `OverviewSection.tsx` (2773–3127, 354 LOC)
  - `RouteMapSection.tsx` (3128–3140 — thin wrapper, 12 LOC)
  - `ItinerarySection.tsx` (3141–3222, 81 LOC)
  - `FeaturesSection.tsx` (3223–3328, 105 LOC)
  - `HotelsSection.tsx` (3329–3356, 27 LOC)
  - `PricingSection.tsx` (3357–3484, 127 LOC)
  - `NotesSection.tsx` (3485–3827, 342 LOC)
  - `helpers.ts` — `parseDailyItinerary`, `getThemeColor`, `PriceComparisonWidget`, etc. (from pre-section 1–2425)
- **Tasks:** preserve `sectionRefs` ID anchors (sticky-nav scroll depends on them). Keep import path stable: `client/src/App.tsx` still does `import TourDetailPeony from "./pages/TourDetailPeony"` (resolves to `index.tsx`). Code-split each section via React.lazy() (per Domain H bonus combine).
- **Vitest:** test `helpers.ts` parsing (already isolated) — `parseDailyItinerary` 3 cases, `getThemeColor` 2 cases. **Required.**
- **Risk:** customer-facing pixel drift. **Mitigation:** Wave 4 Playwright snapshot test asserts before/after byte-identical render on 3 fixture tours.
- **Est:** 20h AI / 1h Jeff (visual diff smoke).

### Module 2.3 — Split `masterAgent.ts` 3,300 LOC → supervisor + 6 pipelines

- **Files (new dir `server/agents/_pipeline/` — underscore prefix per audit recommendation §A line 67):**
  - `server/agents/masterAgent.ts` (kept, target ≤ 400 LOC — supervisor try/catch shell + cache check Phase 0)
  - `_pipeline/scrape.ts` — Phase 1 (Lion API + Puppeteer fallback), 1,109 LOC source
  - `_pipeline/contentAnalyzer.ts` — Phase 2 (lines 1488–1542)
  - `_pipeline/colorTheme.ts` — Phase 3 (1543–1621)
  - `_pipeline/fanout.ts` — Phase 4 parallel 6-agent fanout (1622–2158)
  - `_pipeline/assembly.ts` — Phase 5+6 assembly + universal fallbacks + image library + price rescue + self-repair (2159–3061)
  - `_pipeline/rollback.ts` — error recovery (3062+)
- **Tasks:** keep external API stable (`generateTourFromUrl(url)` signature unchanged). Each pipeline file exports one async function consumed by supervisor.
- **Vitest:** supervisor smoke (mocked pipelines) + per-pipeline happy + 1 failure-injection per pipeline. **Required.**
- **Risk:** highest blast radius of any v2 split (every AI tour generation goes through this). **Mitigation:** Wave 1's Sentry already firing → any prod regression visible in <2min; rollback = revert the supervisor commit (sub-pipelines stay in place but unreachable).
- **Est:** 26h AI / 1h Jeff (test fixtures review).

### Module 2.4 — Split `agentRouter.ts` 2,804 LOC → 7 sub-files

- **Files (new dir `server/routers/agent/`):**
  - `server/routers/agentRouter.ts` (kept, composition shell ~50 LOC)
  - `agent/chat.ts` — agentChat handlers (~400 LOC)
  - `agent/ops.ts` — opsAgent + opsStream procedures (~400 LOC)
  - `agent/reports.ts` — agentReport + selfRetrospective admin endpoints (~300 LOC)
  - `agent/skills.ts` — admin skill invocation (~400 LOC)
  - `agent/calibration.ts` — calibration admin (~400 LOC)
  - `agent/monitor.ts` — agent monitoring read endpoints (~300 LOC)
  - `agent/admin.ts` — agent CRUD + config (~400 LOC)
- **Tasks:** spread composition pattern from v1 Phase 4F (`...chatRouter._def.procedures`). Client tRPC paths unchanged.
- **Vitest:** 1 happy-path per file. **Required.**
- **Est:** 12h AI / 30min Jeff.

### Module 2.5 — Split `email.ts` 1,302 LOC → per-template

- **Files (new dir `server/email/`):**
  - `server/email.ts` (kept, exports + Resend client init, ~100 LOC)
  - `email/templates/bookingConfirmation.ts`, `refundConfirmation.ts`, `paymentReminder.ts`, `tripReminder.ts`, `welcomeMember.ts`, `quoteFollowUp.ts`, `abandonmentRecovery.ts`, `customerReview.ts` (one per template)
  - `email/_shared.ts` — bilingual header/footer, brand colors, logo URL, etc.
- **Tasks:** preserve `sendBookingConfirmation(booking)` etc. signatures. Move per-template HTML into its own file.
- **Vitest:** 1 render test per template (snapshot of HTML output, mocked `Resend.send`). **Required.**
- **Est:** 8h AI.

### Module 2.6 — Split `TourEditDialog.tsx` 2,156 LOC → tabbed sub-components

- **Files (new dir `client/src/components/admin/tour-edit/`):**
  - `client/src/components/admin/TourEditDialog.tsx` (kept, target ≤ 400 LOC — tab orchestrator + props + save flow)
  - `tour-edit/BasicInfoTab.tsx`, `ItineraryTab.tsx`, `PricingTab.tsx`, `HotelsTab.tsx`, `FlightsTab.tsx`, `PoliciesTab.tsx`, `ImageGalleryTab.tsx`, `PreviewTab.tsx`
- **Tasks:** lift shared state (tour draft, dirty flag) to dialog root, pass via context. Each tab is self-contained form.
- **Vitest:** N/A (admin client component); Playwright in Wave 4 covers.
- **Est:** 12h AI / 30min Jeff.

### Module 2.7 — Extract `getRouteMap` 760-LOC procedure

- **Files:** extract from `server/routers/toursRouteMap.ts:??` (the single 760-LOC procedure flagged in audit §C line 156). New `server/services/routeMap/{builder,renderer,fallbacks}.ts`. Router becomes a thin caller.
- **Tasks:** preserve external tRPC path `trpc.tours.getRouteMap`.
- **Vitest:** 3 cases (happy, missing-coords fallback, malformed-payload reject). **Required.**
- **Est:** 8h AI.

### Wave 2 verification gate

- [ ] `pnpm tsc --noEmit` exit 0
- [ ] `pnpm test` green + ~25 new Vitest cases from this wave
- [ ] `wc -l server/db.ts` ≤ 800 (residual visa/inquiries/etc.)
- [ ] `wc -l server/agents/masterAgent.ts` ≤ 400
- [ ] `wc -l client/src/pages/TourDetailPeony/index.tsx` ≤ 400
- [ ] No `index-*.js` chunk over 600 KB (TourDetailPeony code-split kicks in)
- [ ] Manual smoke: AI tour generation runs end-to-end on staging w/ pipeline split active
- **Jeff review:** 1h — review the 4 supervisor-stitched composition shells (`db.ts`, `masterAgent.ts`, `agentRouter.ts`, `email.ts`).

**Wave 2 unblocks:** Wave 3 can wire skills into `masterAgent._pipeline/fanout.ts` cleanly; Wave 4 can add admin design-system primitives without contending with TourEditDialog god-file.

---

## Wave 3 — Autonomy Thesis

**Goal:** Wire the 5 new sub-intents, build the skill registry, dispatch skills automatically, give RefundAgent a real autonomous trigger, port 2 missing skills, and lay down a Vitest smoke per autonomous agent so the loop is **tested, observable, and trusted**.

**Hours:** ~110 AI / ~4 Jeff. **Calendar:** Weeks 3 (tail) – 4.
**Audit refs:** Domain A entirely (§A line 17), Domain B P0+P1 (§B line 89), Domain I autonomous-agent tests (§I line 519).

### Module 3.1 — Add 5 sub-intents to InquiryAgent classifier

Per **D1 (locked):** 5 NEW values: `quote_request` / `flight_inquiry` / `tour_comparison_request` / `visa_inquiry` / `deposit_inquiry`. Existing values stay.

- **Files:** `server/agents/autonomous/inquiryAgent.ts:131-141` (extend union); update classification prompt with examples per new intent; update `inquiryAgent.ts:113` `alwaysEscalate` decision matrix; update DB enum if `inquiries.classification` is enum-typed (check `drizzle/schema.ts`).
- **Tasks:** add 1 fixture email per new intent to test corpus. Update `selfRetrospective.ts` to track new intents in weekly report.
- **Vitest:** 5 new cases — each fixture email classified to expected intent. **Required.**
- **Risk:** classifier regression on existing intents. **Mitigation:** keep all 7 existing test cases unchanged; new cases additive only.
- **Est:** 8h AI / 30min Jeff (review intent boundaries on borderline emails).

### Module 3.2 — Build skill registry

Per **D3 (locked):** static `Map<Intent, SkillId>` in `server/agents/skills/registry.ts`. Inline, NOT DB-driven.

- **Files:** new `server/agents/skills/registry.ts`:
  ```ts
  export const skillRegistry = new Map<Intent, SkillId>([
    ["quote_request", "packgo-quote"],
    ["flight_inquiry", "packgo-flight-ticket"],
    ["tour_comparison_request", "packgo-tour-comparison"],
    ["visa_inquiry", "packgo-china-visa"],
    ["deposit_inquiry", "packgo-deposit-receipt"],
    ["new_inquiry", "packgo-tour-comparison"], // default — broadest skill
  ]);
  export function lookupSkill(intent: Intent): SkillId | null { ... }
  ```
- **Tasks:** export typed `SkillId` enum mirroring `server/services/skills/` exports. Intent that maps to a skill not-yet-ported returns null (logged for Jeff visibility).
- **Vitest:** 7 cases (each intent → expected skill or null). **Required.**
- **Est:** 4h AI.

### Module 3.3 — Wire auto-dispatch in InquiryAgent

- **Files:** modify `server/agents/autonomous/inquiryAgent.ts` — after classification, look up `skillRegistry.get(intent)`; if found AND confidence ≥ threshold, call the skill orchestrator with email context; persist `skillRunId` on the inquiry record; attach skill output PDF to a draft reply for Jeff.
- **DECISION (Stage 2 entry, lock with Jeff):** auto-send vs draft-only? **Recommendation:** v2 stays draft-only — every skill output goes into Jeff's inbox queue for one-click send. Auto-send is a v3 trust milestone gated on Jeff seeing 100 successful drafts.
- **Files modified:** `inquiryAgent.ts`, `gmailPipeline.ts` (add `skillRun` field to pipeline result), `drizzle/schema.ts` (add `inquiries.skillRunId` FK + migration 0079).
- **Vitest:** 3 cases (`quote_request` → calls `packgo-quote`; `flight_inquiry` with no port → returns null + escalates; refund_request → bypasses dispatch + escalates).
- **Risk:** runaway skill execution costs (LLM tokens for every email). **Mitigation:** `agentMonitor` daily caps (already exists in `server/agents/_helpers/AgentMonitor`); add per-skill budget config.
- **Est:** 12h AI / 30min Jeff (auto-send-vs-draft decision).

### Module 3.4 — Port `packgo-flight-ticket` skill

- **Files:** new `server/services/skills/flightTicketTemplate.ts` (PDF gen using existing `skillPdfService.ts` infra); register in `server/agents/skills/flightTicket.ts` orchestrator (reads email or admin form → PDF).
- **Tasks:** mirror Mac plugin 208-LOC SKILL.md. Use `wkhtmltopdf` server-side substitute (or `puppeteer` since already deployed). A4 layout, big-text design per Jeff's elderly customer requirements.
- **Vitest:** snapshot test on 1 fixture flight comparison → PDF generated, size > 30 KB. **Required.**
- **Est:** 10h AI.

### Module 3.5 — Port `packgo-china-visa` skill

- **Files:** new `server/services/skills/chinaVisaTemplate.ts` (visa checklist + intake form PDF); orchestrator `server/agents/skills/chinaVisa.ts`.
- **Tasks:** outputs intake form pre-filled with customer data from `chinaVisaApplications` table.
- **Vitest:** snapshot + 1 missing-field happy-path. **Required.**
- **Est:** 8h AI.

### Module 3.6 — Wire RefundAgent into Stripe refund webhook

- **Files:** modify `server/_core/stripeWebhook.ts` `charge.refunded` handler — after refund DB update + packpoint clawback, call `refundAgent.draftCustomerEmail(charge)`; persist draft in inquiry queue for Jeff one-click send.
- **Tasks:** RefundAgent currently invoked only via admin manual button (audit §A line 33). Wire it autonomously, keep draft-only (refund emotions are high; auto-send too risky).
- **Vitest:** webhook fires → RefundAgent draft created → no email sent yet → Jeff sees draft in inbox. **Required.**
- **Est:** 4h AI.

### Module 3.7 — Vitest smoke per autonomous agent (15 files)

Per **§九 紅線** every autonomous agent must have a test.

- **Files:** add `server/agents/autonomous/*.test.ts` for all 13 files in `server/agents/autonomous/` + 2 in `server/agents/` root (currently 4 of those have tests per audit §I line 511, so net new ~11).
- **Tasks per file:** 1 happy-path test (input fixture → expected output, mocked LLM via `vi.mock("server/_core/llm")`) + 1 failure-mode test (LLM throws → agent calls `notifyOwner` + returns null cleanly). **DECISION (Stage 2 entry, lock with Jeff):** mock strategy. **Recommendation:** `vi.mock("server/_core/llm")` returning deterministic fixtures (simpler than `nock`/`msw` since LLM is the only network surface most agents hit).
- **Files (15):** `inquiryAgent`, `gmailPipeline`, `selfRetrospective`, `agentReport`, `accountingAgent`, `followupAgent`, `marketingAgent`, `reviewAgent`, `refundAgent`, `opsAgent`, `opsAgentStream`, `agentChat`, `agentTools`, `officeAssistant`, `opsActions`.
- **Vitest:** ~30 cases. **Required.**
- **Est:** 18h AI.

### Module 3.8 — Smoke test `masterAgent` supervisor + email templates

- **Files:** `server/agents/masterAgent.test.ts` (mocked sub-pipelines, supervisor orchestration flow); `server/email/templates/*.test.ts` (per-template render, mocked Resend — done in Wave 2 Module 2.5).
- **Tasks:** test supervisor cache-hit path; cache-miss → scrape → fanout → assembly happy; one pipeline throws → assembly recovers via fallback.
- **Vitest:** ~6 cases.
- **Est:** 8h AI.

### Module 3.9 — Unify failure-mode handling across autonomous agents

- **Files:** every agent in `server/agents/autonomous/*.ts` uses `RetryManager` + `notifyOwner` on top-level catch. Currently inconsistent (audit §A line 71).
- **Tasks:** add wrapper helper `withAutonomousSafety(agentName, fn)` in `server/agents/_helpers/`; refactor agents to use it.
- **Vitest:** 2 cases (success passes through; error → `notifyOwner` called).
- **Est:** 6h AI.

### Module 3.10 — Migrate `agentReport.ts` to weekly cron

- **Files:** `server/queue.ts` add cron pattern (Monday 09:00 PT — same window as `selfRetrospective`); new `server/workers/agentReportWorker.ts`; remove TODO at `server/agents/autonomous/agentReport.ts:18`.
- **Tasks:** worker fires `runWeeklyAgentReport()` → sends summary email to Jeff.
- **Vitest:** worker invocation triggers agent report (mocked).
- **Est:** 2h AI.

### Module 3.11 — Disambiguate the 3 "skills" folders

- **Files:** rename `server/skills/` → `server/agents/_subskills/` (these are MasterAgent's internal progressive-disclosure subskills, not autonomous-discoverable). Keep `server/services/skills/` (PDF templates). Keep `server/agents/skills/` (orchestrators + registry).
- **Tasks:** update all imports (~30 files); update CLAUDE.md §六 file map.
- **Vitest:** N/A (rename + import update); existing tests cover.
- **Est:** 2h AI.

### Module 3.12 — Fix top 10 customer-facing i18n leaks

- **Files:** 10 files from audit §D line 234 (472 leaks total): `RegionPage.tsx` (92), `TourRouteMapCanvas.tsx` (74), `SearchResults.tsx` (72), `validationSchemas.ts` (52), `TourDetailPeony.tsx` (42, fold into Wave 2 split), `CountryPage.tsx` (41), `DestinationAutocomplete.tsx` (38), `MembershipTerms.tsx` (29), `Profile.tsx` (16), `Emergency.tsx` (16).
- **Tasks:** add ~250 i18n keys to `client/src/i18n/zh-TW.ts` + `client/src/i18n/en.ts`; replace hardcoded strings with `t('key')`. Some files (`validationSchemas.ts`) need Zod error-message refactor.
- **Vitest:** `zh-TW.keys === en.keys` (likely already exists, verify per audit §D line 267).
- **Est:** 18h AI.

### Module 3.13 — i18n lint rule (block Chinese chars in JSX)

- **Files:** custom ESLint plugin or `eslint-plugin-i18n-json` rule; add to CI.
- **Tasks:** detects `<p>選擇日期</p>` patterns; allows in dynamic data + audit-marked comments.
- **Vitest:** N/A (lint).
- **Est:** 3h AI.

### Wave 3 verification gate

- [ ] `pnpm tsc --noEmit` exit 0
- [ ] `pnpm test` green + ~45 new Vitest cases from this wave
- [ ] All 15 autonomous agents have `.test.ts` (verify via `find ... -name "*.test.ts" | wc`)
- [ ] Staging: send a quote-request email to integration inbox → InquiryAgent classifies `quote_request` → `packgo-quote` skill runs → PDF attached to draft → Jeff sees in inbox
- [ ] Same flow for `flight_inquiry`
- [ ] Refund webhook on Stripe staging → RefundAgent drafts email → Jeff sees draft
- [ ] PostHog (from Wave 1) shows reduction in Jeff manual skill invocations (proxy metric)
- [ ] Customer-facing i18n leak count drops from 640 to <170 (audit-script regression)
- **Jeff review:** 1h — review 5 drafted skill outputs end-to-end on staging emails.

**Wave 3 unblocks:** Wave 4 mobile inbox can show "skill-suggested-draft" status; admin design system can include `<SkillDraftCard>` primitive.

---

## Wave 4 — Mobile + Polish

**Goal:** Ship customer-facing PWA + admin React Native app + final cleanup (Playwright, i18n restructure, leak sweep, design-system primitives, performance polish).

**Hours:** ~156 AI / ~11 Jeff. **Calendar:** Weeks 4–6.
**Audit refs:** Domain L NEW (this plan §Mobile detailed spec), Domain D restructure (§D line 258), Domain E primitives (§E line 316), Domain H residual (§H line 484), Domain I Playwright (§I line 555), Domain G residual (§G line 428), Domain K scripts cleanup (§K line 690).

**Note on locale file path:** CLAUDE.md §六 says `client/src/locales/` but actual repo path is `client/src/i18n/` (verified). This v2-plan uses the actual `client/src/i18n/` path. CLAUDE.md will be corrected in Wave 4 closing docs update.

### Mobile Domain (L) Detailed Spec

#### L1 — Customer PWA (~50h AI)

##### Module 4.1 — manifest.json + icons (polish — existing file)
- **Files:** `client/public/manifest.json` already exists (Round 81 added iOS Add-to-Home-Screen tags in `client/index.html` already — verify scope/start_url/icons completeness). Generate proper icons 192×192, 512×512, 180×180 (apple-touch-icon currently points to `/images/logo-bag-black-v3.png` which may not be square-cropped).
- **Tasks:** verify manifest has scope="/", start_url="/", display="standalone", background_color="#FFFFFF", theme_color (currently `#111111` per client/index.html — reconcile with CLAUDE.md §2.2 teal-600 `#0D9488` decision with Jeff). Generate proper PWA icon set via existing logo asset.
- **Vitest:** N/A (config); Playwright test (Module 4.16) validates manifest serves.
- **Est:** 4h AI.

##### Module 4.2 — Service worker via Workbox
- **Files:** `package.json` add `vite-plugin-pwa` + `workbox-window`; `vite.config.ts` register plugin with strategies — offline shell (NetworkFirst on `/`, CacheFirst on `/assets/*` immutable hashed assets), runtime cache `/api/trpc/tours.list` (NetworkFirst 5min TTL).
- **Tasks:** prompt-on-update flow (don't auto-reload mid-booking); skip-waiting only on explicit user accept.
- **Vitest:** 2 cases via `workbox-build` API testing strategy mappings.
- **Est:** 10h AI.

##### Module 4.3 — Push notifications (Web Push API)
- **Files:** new `server/_core/webPush.ts` (using `web-push` library); add VAPID keys to env; new tRPC `push.subscribe`/`push.unsubscribe` + `pushSubscriptions` DB table (migration 0080); client `client/src/_core/hooks/usePushSubscription.ts` requests `Notification.permission` after user views 3rd tour (Module 4.4 trigger).
- **Subscribed events:** `booking.confirmed`, `payment.succeeded`, `itinerary.ready`.
- **Vitest:** server-side push fan-out (mocked transport); subscription persistence. **Required.**
- **Risk:** iOS Safari 16.4+ supports Web Push but only for **installed PWAs** (must be on home screen first). Many users won't install. **Mitigation:** documented limitation; fall back to email for iOS pre-install. Flagged as **Risk #1 (mobile push reliability)** in risk register.
- **Est:** 14h AI / 30min Jeff (VAPID key generation).

##### Module 4.4 — Install prompt UX
- **Files:** new `client/src/components/PWAInstallPrompt.tsx`; trigger after user views 3 tour-detail pages (track in PostHog → localStorage flag); shows iOS-specific instructions (Share → Add to Home Screen) on Safari; uses `beforeinstallprompt` event on Chrome/Edge/Android.
- **Vitest:** 2 cases (3-view threshold; iOS detection).
- **Est:** 6h AI.

##### Module 4.5 — Lighthouse PWA score ≥ 90 verification
- **Files:** CI script `scripts/lighthouse-pwa-check.mjs` runs Lighthouse against staging deploy on every merge to main; fails if PWA score < 90 or performance < 70.
- **Tasks:** integrate with GitHub Actions or Fly post-deploy hook.
- **Vitest:** N/A.
- **Est:** 4h AI / 15min Jeff (CI config).

##### Module 4.6 — Customer-facing mobile responsiveness pass
- **Files:** top 10 customer pages — apply responsive breakpoints, fix tap targets ≥ 44×44 px, fix iOS Safari status bar overlap, fix sticky nav z-index conflicts.
- **Tasks:** test on iPhone SE (smallest current device) + iPhone 15 Pro Max + Pixel 8.
- **Vitest:** Playwright mobile viewport snapshot tests (Module 4.16 covers).
- **Est:** 12h AI / 30min Jeff (manual device test).

#### L2 — Admin React Native (Expo) (~100h AI)

##### Module 4.7 — Monorepo + shared types
- **Files:** root `pnpm-workspace.yaml` (NEW — doesn't exist per env check); convert root to monorepo:
  - `packages/shared/` — types extracted from `drizzle/schema.ts` types + tRPC `appRouter` type + i18n keys
  - `packages/web/` — current `client/` + `server/` (or keep separate)
  - `packages/mobile/` — new Expo app
- **DECISION (Stage 2 entry, lock with Jeff):** monorepo conversion vs `packages/shared/` only? **Recommendation:** add `packages/shared/` as a single new package; keep `client/`+`server/` at root for v2 minimum disruption. v3 can fully monorepo if Wave 4 lands cleanly.
- **Vitest:** import-path tests; `tsc --noEmit` passes across all packages.
- **Risk:** import-path churn breaks v1 stable. **Mitigation:** shared types via re-export shim; root paths unchanged for web client.
- **Est:** 8h AI / 1h Jeff (review monorepo boundaries).

##### Module 4.8 — Expo project setup
- **Files:** `packages/mobile/` with `expo-router`, `expo-notifications`, `@trpc/react-query`, NativeWind (Tailwind for RN); `app.json` with iOS bundle ID `com.packgo.admin`, Android `com.packgo.admin`; EAS config for builds.
- **Tasks:** install Expo SDK 51+, configure dark mode (matches admin design-system intent), import shared TypeScript types.
- **Vitest:** N/A (Detox in Module 4.14 covers).
- **Est:** 8h AI.

##### Module 4.9 — Auth: Manus OAuth via deep link
- **Files:** `packages/mobile/app/login.tsx`; use `expo-auth-session` with PKCE; redirect URI `packgoadmin://auth/callback`; store tokens in `expo-secure-store` (keychain on iOS, Keystore on Android).
- **Tasks:** verify Manus OAuth accepts custom redirect scheme. Add fallback to web OAuth in mobile WebView if deep-link fails on dev simulator.
- **Vitest:** N/A; Detox covers.
- **Risk:** Manus OAuth may not accept non-https redirect URIs. **Mitigation:** flagged as **Risk #3 (RN auth flow with Manus OAuth)** in risk register; mitigation = use Universal Links (iOS) + App Links (Android) on `packgo09.manus.space/auth/mobile` → app intercepts.
- **Est:** 12h AI / 1h Jeff (Manus OAuth redirect URI config).

##### Module 4.10 — Inbox screen (UnifiedInbox parity)
- **Files:** `packages/mobile/app/(tabs)/inbox.tsx`; list view backed by `trpc.inquiries.listForAdmin` (same query as web); pull-to-refresh; swipe-to-archive; tap for detail.
- **Tasks:** match web `OfficeInboxTab.tsx` feature parity for inbox-list operations (read, archive, label). Reuse drafts from Wave 3 skill dispatch.
- **Vitest:** Detox smoke (Module 4.14).
- **Est:** 14h AI.

##### Module 4.11 — Agent Chat screen
- **Files:** `packages/mobile/app/(tabs)/agent-chat.tsx`; streaming chat UI subscribing to `trpc.agentChat.stream` (same as web).
- **Tasks:** message bubbles per CLAUDE.md §2.1 (`rounded-xl` equiv in NativeWind), markdown rendering via `react-native-markdown-display`.
- **Vitest:** Detox smoke.
- **Est:** 12h AI.

##### Module 4.12 — Bookings list + detail
- **Files:** `packages/mobile/app/(tabs)/bookings.tsx` + `packages/mobile/app/bookings/[id].tsx`; tRPC `bookings.listForAdmin` + `bookings.getById`.
- **Tasks:** filterable list (status, date range); detail shows participants, payment, voucher, packpoint; one-tap "send reminder email".
- **Vitest:** Detox smoke.
- **Est:** 14h AI.

##### Module 4.13 — Native push (APNs/FCM via Expo Notifications)
- **Files:** `packages/mobile/app/_layout.tsx` registers `expo-notifications`; new tRPC `push.registerMobileDevice` (separate from web push — different token format); reuse `pushSubscriptions` table with `platform="ios"|"android"|"web"` column.
- **Tasks:** subscribe to: `email.received` (new customer email — "客人寄 email 你立刻知道"), `booking.confirmed`, `payment.received`, `refund.requested`, `alert.escalation` (any agent `notifyOwner` call).
- **Vitest:** server-side notification dispatcher routes correctly per platform. **Required.**
- **Est:** 12h AI.

##### Module 4.14 — Detox smoke tests
- **Files:** `packages/mobile/e2e/login.test.ts`, `inbox.test.ts`, `send-reply.test.ts`.
- **Tasks:** 3 critical flows per spec. Run on EAS preview build in CI.
- **Vitest:** Detox suite. **Required.**
- **Est:** 8h AI.

##### Module 4.15 — App Store + Google Play submission prep
- **Files:** `packages/mobile/store-assets/` (icons 1024×1024, screenshots 6.7"/6.5"/5.5" iPhone, 12.9"/11" iPad, Pixel sizes Android); privacy policy URL (Jeff supplies); App Store Connect listing draft; Google Play listing draft.
- **Tasks:** Jeff signs in to App Store Connect + Play Console (Jeff-only step); EAS Submit handles build upload.
- **Risk:** App Store review rejection on first submission (~30% of new apps). **Mitigation:** flagged as **Risk #4** in risk register; review Apple's HIG checklist before submission; submit 7 days before Jeff plans to use it.
- **Est:** 12h AI / 4h Jeff (cert + listings).

### Wave 4 — Polish (the non-mobile half)

##### Module 4.16 — Playwright + 5 customer flow tests
- **Files:** `package.json` add `@playwright/test`; new `e2e/` dir; tests: `book-tour.spec.ts`, `search.spec.ts`, `signup.spec.ts`, `membership.spec.ts`, `contact.spec.ts`.
- **Tasks:** runs against staging URL; in CI on every push to main.
- **Vitest:** N/A (Playwright is the framework). **Required.**
- **Est:** 14h AI.

##### Module 4.17 — i18n dictionary restructure
- **Files:** split `client/src/i18n/zh-TW.ts` (6,220 LOC) + `client/src/i18n/en.ts` (6,218 LOC) — current i18n dir also has `ja.ts`, `ko.ts`, `index.ts` — into `client/src/i18n/zh-TW/{admin,booking,tours,membership,visa,common,errors,validation,marketing,emergency,profile,about,legal}.ts` (~13 sub-modules × 500 LOC each); `client/src/i18n/zh-TW/index.ts` re-exports flat object so `t('admin.foo')` works. Apply same split to `en.ts`; `ja.ts`+`ko.ts` defer to v3 (much smaller, not pulling weight yet).
- **Tasks:** preserve all 6,220 keys; verify `zh-TW.keys === en.keys` post-split.
- **Vitest:** key-parity test + import-stability test. **Required.**
- **Est:** 8h AI.

##### Module 4.18 — Fix remaining 506 admin-side i18n leaks
- **Files:** admin tabs (~37 files); replace hardcoded strings with `t('admin.<tab>.<key>')`.
- **Vitest:** key parity holds.
- **Est:** 14h AI.

##### Module 4.19 — Admin design-system primitives
- **Files (new dir `client/src/components/admin/_primitives/`):** `DataTable.tsx`, `KPIStrip.tsx`, `DomainSidebar.tsx`, `CommandPalette.tsx`, `DetailDrawer.tsx`, `EmptyState.tsx`, `StatusDot.tsx`. Per `feedback_admin_design_system.md` A+B design.
- **Tasks:** tokens file `_tokens/spacing.ts`/`colors.ts`/`typography.ts`; primitives use tokens only; document via Storybook (Module 4.20).
- **Vitest:** 1 happy render per primitive. **Required.**
- **Est:** 16h AI.

##### Module 4.20 — Storybook + visual regression on primitives
- **Files:** `.storybook/` config; story file per primitive; visual regression via Chromatic (free tier).
- **Tasks:** baseline snapshots; CI fails on >1% pixel diff.
- **Vitest:** N/A.
- **Est:** 10h AI / 15min Jeff (Chromatic account).

##### Module 4.21 — Refit top 5 admin tabs to primitives
- **Files:** `OfficeOverviewTab.tsx`, `ToursTab.tsx`, `AccountingTab.tsx`, `ChatsTab.tsx`, `OfficeInboxTab.tsx`.
- **Tasks:** swap hand-rolled tables for `<DataTable>`; KPIs for `<KPIStrip>`; etc.
- **Vitest:** existing tests still pass.
- **Est:** 18h AI.

##### Module 4.22 — `loading="lazy"` sweep + font preload
- **Files:** 80 `<img>` tags missing `loading="lazy"`; `client/index.html` add `<link rel="preload" as="font" href="..." crossorigin>` for Noto Serif TC + Inter; `font-display: swap` in CSS.
- **Vitest:** N/A.
- **Est:** 4h AI.

##### Module 4.23 — Fix 3 confirmed N+1 queries
- **Files:** `server/routers/plaidRouter.ts` (insertedIds loop), `server/routers/skills.ts` (dependsOn loop), `server/services/aiChatSkillService.ts` (usageLogIds loop). Replace each with `inArray()` batch query.
- **Vitest:** before/after query count assertion. **Required.**
- **Est:** 4h AI.

##### Module 4.24 — Audit log on all admin mutations
- **Files:** refactor `server/trpc.ts` `adminProcedure` to auto-write `auditLog` row on every mutation (input, user, timestamp, route name); remove now-duplicate ad-hoc audit calls in 10 routers.
- **Tasks:** log redaction (no passport, no token).
- **Vitest:** 2 cases (mutation writes audit; query does not). **Required.**
- **Est:** 8h AI.

##### Module 4.25 — Helmet-style security headers
- **Files:** new `server/_core/securityHeaders.ts`; Hono middleware sets CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy.
- **Tasks:** CSP starts permissive (`'self' 'unsafe-inline'`), tighten in v3.
- **Vitest:** middleware sets expected headers.
- **Est:** 4h AI.

##### Module 4.26 — Scripts purge (12 files archive + 3 stale delete + 1 stash decision)
- **Files:** `scripts/_archive/2026-Q2/` move `fix-*` + `japan-sept-*` (~12 files); delete `apply-migration-0033/4/5.mjs` (3 files) + `wipe-all-tours.mjs` (replace with `adminProcedure` endpoint); apply or drop stash `phase0/mod4/root-check-scripts` (Jeff 30min decision).
- **Tasks:** zero behavior change.
- **Vitest:** N/A.
- **Est:** 4h AI / 30min Jeff.

##### Module 4.27 — Wave 4 Sentry/PostHog/uptime tuning
- **Files:** `server/_core/sentry.ts` add ignored errors (known noisy); PostHog dashboard URLs into admin "Health" tab.
- **Vitest:** N/A.
- **Est:** 2h AI.

### Wave 4 verification gate

- [ ] `pnpm tsc --noEmit` exit 0 across all packages
- [ ] `pnpm test` green + ~25 new Vitest cases this wave
- [ ] Playwright 5 customer flows pass on staging
- [ ] Detox 3 mobile flows pass on EAS preview build
- [ ] Lighthouse PWA score ≥ 90 on prod
- [ ] iOS PWA install verified on Jeff's iPhone
- [ ] Android Expo Go install of admin app verified on Jeff's test device
- [ ] App Store submission accepted (or in review)
- [ ] i18n leak count: 1,203 → <100 (residual = library/build-tool strings)
- [ ] Customer-side bundles: no chunk > 500 KB
- [ ] Sentry + UptimeRobot + PostHog all healthy on prod (carry from Wave 1)
- **Jeff review:** ~6h — install both apps, run 3 booking flows, sign Apple/Google certificates, App Store listing copy review.

**Final tag:** `git tag refactor-v2-complete`.

---

## Risk Register

| # | Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation | Rollback |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Mobile push reliability on iOS Safari PWA** — iOS only delivers Web Push to installed PWAs (home-screen); many users won't install | High | Medium | Document limitation in user-facing PWA prompt; fall back to email for non-installed iOS; emphasize push as native-app advantage (drives Wave 4 RN adoption) | Disable push subscribe prompt on iOS Safari without `navigator.standalone`; email-only fallback intact |
| 2 | **`db.ts` split breaking sub-router imports** — 40 routers freely `import { ... } from "../db"`; shim must preserve every export | Medium | High (every customer query) | Shim with `export * from` chains; CI tsc gate catches any miss; staging deploy 24h before prod | Single revert of split commit restores monolith db.ts; sub-router imports unchanged |
| 3 | **React Native Manus OAuth deep-link flow** — Manus may not accept custom URI schemes; PKCE flow on mobile is fragile | Medium | High (blocks admin app entirely) | Universal Links (iOS) + App Links (Android) intercepting `packgo09.manus.space/auth/mobile`; fallback to in-app WebView with cookie bridge; spike auth in Wave 4 Module 4.9 BEFORE building screens | Use cookie-bridge WebView wrapper if PKCE fails; ship admin app w/ degraded session lifespan |
| 4 | **App Store review rejection** — first-submission rejection rate ~30% | Medium | Medium (delays admin app 7-14 days) | HIG checklist pre-submission; submit 7d before Jeff "uses it"; have privacy policy + screenshots polished | Address rejection feedback + resubmit; meanwhile Jeff uses Expo Dev Build (no review) |
| 5 | **`masterAgent` split regression on AI tour generation** — highest blast radius; if pipeline split misorders, prod tours fail | Medium | High (every new tour) | Sentry firing from Wave 1 → 2min detection; pipeline tests in Wave 2 Module 2.3 cover failure-injection per pipeline; staged deploy with manual smoke before prod | Revert supervisor commit; pipelines remain but unreachable; prior monolith logic restored |
| 6 | **Skill auto-dispatch runaway LLM cost** — InquiryAgent fires on every poll; if skill registry mis-maps, every email runs every skill | Low | Medium (cost spike) | `AgentMonitor` daily caps; per-skill budget config; alert at 200% normal daily spend | Set `skillRegistry` to empty Map; classifier still works, no skills dispatched |
| 7 | **Vitest mock drift across 15 new agent tests** — mocks for `llm` go stale as real LLM API changes | Low | Low | Mock signature pinned to type definition; tsc catches drift | Update mocks; tests are smoke not integration |
| 8 | **Wave 4 monorepo conversion breaking v1 stable** — adding `packages/shared/` shifts every import path | Medium | High (cross-cutting) | Stage 2 decision: shared package only, no root restructure (per recommendation Module 4.7); shim layer at `client/src/types/shared.ts` re-exports | Revert monorepo PR; types stay in old locations |

---

## Calendar / Pacing

Jeff capacity: ~6-8h/week of active review/decisions. Sub-agents run autonomous between his sessions.

| Week | Wave | Sub-agent hours | Jeff hours | Deliverables |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Wave 1 + start Wave 2.1 | ~58 + ~14 = 72 | 3 | Observability live, db.ts split |
| 2 | Wave 2 (2.2–2.5) | ~66 | 1 | TourDetailPeony + masterAgent + agentRouter + email splits |
| 3 | Wave 2 finish + start Wave 3 | ~16 + ~30 = 46 | 1 | TourEditDialog + getRouteMap; sub-intents + registry |
| 4 | Wave 3 finish + start Wave 4 | ~80 + ~30 = 110 | 4 | Auto-dispatch + skills ported + 15 agent tests + sub-intent staging smoke; start PWA + monorepo |
| 5 | Wave 4 (mobile) | ~80 | 4 | RN screens + push wired + Expo build to TestFlight |
| 6 | Wave 4 finish + verification | ~46 | 6 | Playwright + i18n + primitives + final smoke + App Store submission |
| 7 (buffer) | App Store review wait + hot-fixes | ~10 | 3 | Address review feedback; prod monitoring |

**Total: ~420 AI hours + ~22 Jeff hours over 6 weeks (+ 1 week App Store buffer = 7 weeks worst case).** This is 2x v1's burst but covers ~3x the surface area and adds mobile.

**Deploy cadence:** ~2 prod deploys/week. Risky modules (`db.ts` split, `masterAgent` split, `stripeWebhook.charge.refunded` hook) deploy Tue/Wed/Thu 9–11am PT only.

---

## Stage 3 Entry Criteria

Per CLAUDE.md §九 — before Stage 3 (task split) starts, Jeff must lock these:

### Decisions already locked (this plan)
- [x] D1 — 5 sub-intent values
- [x] D2 — db.ts 7-file split (not 11)
- [x] D3 — skill registry inline `Map<Intent, SkillId>`
- [x] D4 — §九 LOC-rule exemption for `toursAdmin.ts`/`skills.ts` (Option B exemption to document in CLAUDE.md)
- [x] Domain L scope — PWA + Expo, ~150h, draft-only push initially

### Decisions to lock at Stage 3 entry (~1h Jeff)

| # | Decision | Default if Jeff defers |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Sentry tier (free 5K vs Team $26/mo) | Free; upgrade reactively |
| 2 | PostHog region (US vs EU) | US (Fly IAD latency) |
| 3 | Auto-send vs draft-only for high-confidence skill output (Wave 3) | Draft-only; auto-send is v3 |
| 4 | Vitest mock strategy (`vi.mock` vs `msw`) | `vi.mock` for `llm`; `msw` only if HTTP layer matters |
| 5 | Monorepo scope (Wave 4) — `packages/shared/` only vs full | shared/ only |
| 6 | iOS PWA push gracefully-degrade messaging | "Install to home screen to enable push" tooltip |
| 7 | Mobile bundle ID + App Store team membership | Jeff personal team; bundle `com.packgo.admin` |
| 8 | Stash `phase0/mod4/root-check-scripts` decision | Drop unless Jeff identifies reusable content |
| 9 | Migration 0078 passport encryption window (immediate vs lazy-on-read) | Immediate (one-shot batched backfill) |
| 10 | Module 4.27 polish wave timing — bundle with Wave 4 or split to v3 | Bundle |

### Accounts Jeff must create (~1h)
- [ ] Sentry account + DSN
- [ ] UptimeRobot account
- [ ] PostHog account + key
- [ ] Apple Developer Program ($99/yr — already if exists)
- [ ] Google Play Console ($25 one-time — already if exists)
- [ ] Chromatic (free tier, for Storybook visual regression)
- [ ] EAS account (free tier for builds)

### `progress.md` template

Top-level `docs/refactor/v2-progress.md` will track Wave × Module × Status × Owner-agent × Last-update, mirroring v1 pattern.

### Stage 3 task-file inventory

Stage 3 (next session, new context) will generate:

```
docs/refactor/tasks/v2/wave-1/  → 9 module files
docs/refactor/tasks/v2/wave-2/  → 7 module files
docs/refactor/tasks/v2/wave-3/  → 13 module files
docs/refactor/tasks/v2/wave-4/  → 27 module files (16 mobile + 11 polish)
```

**Total: 56 module task files.**

---

## Honoring 萬不得以才人力 (Jeff's core principle, CLAUDE.md memory)

This plan deliberately minimizes Jeff touch points to fairness/financial/judgment decisions only:

| Phase | Jeff-only step | Time |
|---|---|---|
| Stage 2 → 3 lock | Decisions 1–10 above | ~1h |
| Wave 1 deploy | Migration 0077/0078 approval + Sentry/PostHog account creation | ~30min |
| Wave 2 deploy | 4 composition-shell reviews + visual diff smoke on TourDetailPeony | ~1.5h |
| Wave 3 deploy | Auto-send-vs-draft confirmation + 5 staging skill flows | ~1.5h |
| Wave 4 deploy | App Store cert + Apple/Play listings + 2 mobile device smoke + final prod regression | ~6h |
| Cross-wave | Reading commit messages, signing off on per-wave gates | ~3h |

**Total Jeff active time: ~22 hours over 6 weeks** — averaging ~3.5h/week. The other ~420h of work is supervisor + sub-agent autonomous, with the Wave-N verification gates as safety net.

- [x] Per-wave verification gates defined
- [x] Per-wave risks + rollbacks defined
- [x] Calendar with Jeff hour budget
